metadata.name: Food token sacrifice to gain 3 life
metadata.description: Demonstrates the Food token sacrifice mechanic that underlies the Forage keyword action (CR 701.61). P1 casts Bake into a Pie ({2BB}) targeting p2's Llanowar Elves: the creature is destroyed and a Food token is created on p1's battlefield. P1 then activates the Food token's built-in ability ({2}, {T}, Sacrifice: You gain 3 life), paying {2} from the mana pool, tapping and sacrificing the token as cost (CR 602.2c — sacrifice is part of the cost so the Food token leaves the battlefield immediately at activation). The ability resolves and p1 gains 3 life (40 → 43). Note: tokens cease to exist when they leave the battlefield (CR 111.7), so Food does not persist in the graveyard after the SBA check. CR 111.10d defines the Food token; CR 701.61 defines Forage as 'exile three cards from your graveyard OR sacrifice a Food'.
metadata.generation_notes: Food token mechanics: CR 111.10d defines Food as a colorless Artifact token with '{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.' food_token_spec() in card_definition.rs creates it with activated_abilities[0] having requires_tap:true, mana_cost:{generic:2}, sacrifice_self:true. Since sacrifice is in the cost (CR 602.2c), the Food token leaves the battlefield before the ability goes on the stack. CR 111.7: tokens cease to exist when they move to a zone other than the battlefield — a state-based action removes them from the graveyard shortly after they arrive. Therefore the final assert does NOT check for Food in p1's graveyard; it only verifies Food is absent from the battlefield and p1's life reached 43. Bake into a Pie ({2BB}) is used to create the Food token in-script (no initial-state token placement since Food has no standalone CardDefinition in all_cards() — it only exists as food_token_spec()/TokenSpec). P1 starts with {black:2, colorless:4} in pool: {black:2, colorless:2} pays for Bake, remaining {colorless:2} pays for the Food activation. Llanowar Elves (p2's 1/1) is the destroy target. CR 701.7a: destroy moves permanent to its owner's graveyard. CR 118.2: life total increases by 3. ability_index:0 is correct — Food has no mana abilities, only the one activated ability (index 0 in the non-mana activated abilities list).

script.step_note: P1 casts Bake into a Pie targeting p2's Llanowar Elves

actions.description: Initial: Bake into a Pie in p1 hand, Llanowar Elves on p2 battlefield, no Food token yet

actions.note: CR 601.2: P1 casts Bake into a Pie ({2BB}), targeting p2's Llanowar Elves. {2BB} paid from pool.

actions.description: After casting: Bake into a Pie on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Bake into a Pie is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 701.7a: Destroy moves Llanowar Elves from p2's battlefield to p2's graveyard.
CR 111.1: A Food token is created on p1's battlefield.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Bake into a Pie resolves — destroy target creature, then create a Food token for p1.

actions.description: After Bake resolves: Llanowar Elves in p2 graveyard, Food token on p1 battlefield, p1 life still 40
actions.note: Food token is now on p1's battlefield, ready to be activated.

script.step_note: P1 activates the Food token's ability: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice — gain 3 life

actions.note: CR 602.2: P1 activates Food token's ability (index 0): pay {2}, tap, sacrifice. Sacrifice is a cost — Food leaves battlefield immediately (CR 602.2c).

actions.description: After Food activation: Food off battlefield (sacrificed as cost), ability on stack
actions.note: CR 602.2c: Sacrifice is paid as part of the activation cost — Food token left the battlefield before the ability was placed on the stack. CR 111.7: token ceases to exist when it leaves the battlefield.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Food ability resolves.

resolution.note: CR 118.2: P1's life total increases by 3 (40 → 43).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Food token ability resolves — controller p1 gains 3 life.

actions.description: Final state: p1 at 43 life, Food token gone (token ceased to exist, CR 111.7), stack empty
actions.note: P1 gained 3 life from sacrificing the Food token. Token is no longer tracked (CR 111.7). This demonstrates the Food sacrifice mechanic used by the Forage keyword action (CR 701.61).
